column2: Verify CAA Denial of RAE(PC) Approval When Application Is Incomplete or Does Not Meet All Requirements
column3: ['Prepare an RAE(PC) application that is either incomplete or does not meet all requirements (e.  , missing required documents, unfulfilled eligibility criteria). ', 'Submit the prepared RAE(PC) application to the CAA for evaluation. ', 'Verify that the CAA denies approval for training and assessment of remote pilots against required competencies. ']
column4: ['The prepared RAE(PC) application contains errors or omissions. ', 'The RAE(PC) application is submitted to the CAA for review. ', 'The CAA informs the applicant that their RAE(PC) application has been denied due to incompleteness or failure to meet all requirements. ']
